text.text: 🥣 Pre-meeting brief: Granola <> Linear — intro (warm intro via Sequoia)

🟢 *Sequoia Capital Operations LLC*  —  ICP *100/100* (Strong)
_A venture capital firm that invests in technology companies and partners with founders from seed through growth stages._
*Signals:* 49 new investments in the last 12 months; active jobs portal (hiring); managing ~ $56B AUM (scale signal)
• *Roelof Botha* — Managing Partner
*Opener:* Ask which founder themes or categories he and the partner team are prioritising this year and whether they’re shifting allocation between early vs. growth investments.

🟢 *Linear Orbit, Inc.*  —  ICP *95/100* (Strong)
_Linear builds a fast, design-forward issue-tracking and project-management SaaS product sold primarily to software and product teams._
*Signals:* 1) $82M Series C in 2025 (part of $134.2M total funding). 2) Hit $100M in revenue in June 2025.
• *Karri Saarinen* — Co‑founder & CEO
• *Jori Lallo* — Co‑founder, Chief Product Officer (CPO)
*Opener:* Mention Linear's recent "Code Intelligence for Linear Agent" post (May 14, 202

text: Pre-meeting brief: Granola <> Linear — intro (warm intro via Sequoia) — 2 company(ies)
